package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for sort_or_filter_whitelist_logic_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated client-field whitelist logic across endpoints.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule189NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule189NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule189NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario189Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule189NegativeService, input Rule189NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
